rule_name: Suspicious Activity Followed by Potential Initial Access Task

text: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potential Initial Access Tasks match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Endpoint Activities match with the same Machine Identifier (custom)
